languages.text: {n}Вы видите, как ошеломляет меровцев ваша отповедь. Когда осознание, что их считают недисциплинированным сбродом, достигает их сознания, все как один отводят взгляд, сгорая от стыда.{/n}
{n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы видите, как ошеломляет меровцев ваша отповедь. Когда осознание, что их считают недисциплинированным сбродом, достигает их сознания, все как один отводят взгляд, сгорая от стыда.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}
{n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}
{n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メリヴィアンたちは、あなたの叱責に呆然としている。彼らが、規律の無い群衆だと見なされていることに気づくと、皆、恥ずかしさで顔を伏せた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}

traits.locale_text: メリヴィアンたちは、あなたの叱責に呆然としている。彼らが、規律の無い群衆だと見なされていることに気づくと、皆、恥ずかしさで顔を伏せた。

languages.text: {n}Azarın karşısında Merovluların şaşkınlığı dikkatini çekiyor. Disiplinsiz bir güruh olarak görüldüklerini idrak ettikçe utançla gözlerini kaçırıyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Azarın karşısında Merovluların şaşkınlığı dikkatini çekiyor. Disiplinsiz bir güruh olarak görüldüklerini idrak ettikçe utançla gözlerini kaçırıyorlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos quedan enmudecidos por tu reprimenda. Cuando comprenden que los consideras una turba indisciplinada, apartan la mirada avergonzados.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los merovianos quedan enmudecidos por tu reprimenda. Cuando comprenden que los consideras una turba indisciplinada, apartan la mirada avergonzados.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在场的梅罗维人被你训懵了。当他们意识到自己被别人当成了一群毫无纪律的乌合之众时，他们都羞愧地避开了目光。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在场的梅罗维人被你训懵了。当他们意识到自己被别人当成了一群毫无纪律的乌合之众时，他们都羞愧地避开了目光。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La stupéfaction se lit sur le visage des Meroviens, qui comprennent à vos réprimandes que vous les considérez comme de vulgaires manants indisciplinés. Honteux, ils détournent tous le regard.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La stupéfaction se lit sur le visage des Meroviens, qui comprennent à vos réprimandes que vous les considérez comme de vulgaires manants indisciplinés. Honteux, ils détournent tous le regard.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du erkennst, wie verblüfft die Merovianer angesichts deiner Rüge sind. Als sie erkennen, dass du sie für undiszipliniertes Gesindel hältst, wenden sie sich beschämt ab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see how stunned the Merovians are by your reprimand. As the realisation that they are considered an undisciplined rabble sinks in, they all avert their eyes in shame.{/n}
